Showing live database records
Booking InfoHotel DetailsBooker DetailsRoom Management (God Mode)

➕ Add Room to Existing Booking

🛡️ This will add a brand new room to this reference number and safely deduct the inventory from the hotel's remaining block.
Total: DKK 0

🔗 Merge Multiple Bookings

🛡️ This tool combines multiple separated bookings into one single Master Booking. Old references will be archived, and inventory will remain safely balanced.

Please select a hotel first.

Amend Room Details

🛡️ Admin God Mode: You can forcefully change room types, upgrade rates, edit names, alter dates, or add notes here. Inventory will NOT be re-checked.
Total: DKK 0

Change Hotel

🛡️ This will transfer the inventory for ALL active rooms in this booking to a new hotel.

⚠️ After moving, all room types and rates will be reset to "TBC". You MUST click "Amend Room" on each room to select the correct room types for the new hotel before resending the email.

🚀 Multi-Room Booking (God Mode)

🛡️ This creates a complete booking under one reference number, bypassing all sold-out limits.
